label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out who ends up with which present after all these swaps. The problem involves tracking the gifts through several swaps between the people. Let me start by listing the initial setup and then track each swap step by step. First, the initial gifts: - Alice: brown present - Bob: orange ball - Claire: green present - Dave: blue present - Eve: white present Then, there are five swaps. Let me go through each one carefully. 1. Eve and Bob swap their gifts. - Before swap: Eve has white, Bob has orange. - After swap: Eve now has orange ball, Bob has white present. 2. Eve and Claire swap their gifts. - Before swap: Eve has orange, Claire has green. - After swap: Eve now has green, Claire has orange. 3. Eve and Dave swap their gifts. - Before swap: Eve has green, Dave has blue. - After swap: Eve now has blue, Dave has green. 4. Dave and Alice swap their gifts. - Before swap: Dave has green, Alice has brown. - After swap: Dave now has brown, Alice has green. 5. Claire and Dave swap their gifts. - Before swap: Claire has orange, Dave has brown. - After swap: Claire now has brown, Dave has orange. So, the question is asking what present does Claire have at the end. From the last swap (step 5), after swapping with Dave, Claire has the brown present. Therefore, the answer would be (A) brown present. Wait, let me check each step again to make sure I didn't make a mistake. Let me track each person's gift after each swap. Initial state: Alice: brown Bob: orange Claire: green Dave: blue Eve: white After first swap (Eve and Bob): Alice: brown Bob: white Claire: green Dave: blue Eve: orange After second swap (Eve and Claire): Alice: brown Bob: white Claire: orange Dave: blue Eve: green After third swap (Eve and Dave): Alice: brown Bob: white Claire: orange Dave: green Eve: blue After fourth swap (Dave and Alice): Dave now has brown (from Alice), and Alice has green (from Dave) So, Alice: green Bob: white Claire: orange Dave: brown Eve: blue After fifth swap (Claire and Dave): Claire now has brown (from Dave), and Dave has orange (from Claire)
